name: HashKey Group
fullText:
The first batch of Hong Kong #stablecoin issuer licences has been granted. 💡 HashKey Group Chairman & CEO Dr. Xiao Feng shared 5 key takeaways on stablecoins:

1️⃣ If Hong Kong aims to be a global digital asset hub, stablecoins are not optional, they are essential infrastructure.
